21235020.name: The Emperor's Mantle
21235020.desc:
Turn Start: Gain 80 Shield
On Kill: Gain 10 Green Roaches (Enhancing)
Turn Start: Gain 4~10 Green Roaches (Enhancing)
21235020.flavor: The Legion of (Green) Roaches moves for no one but its Emperor.

21235030.name: Deity's Revival
21235030.desc: (Once) When HP drops below 0: Recover 25% max HP; gain 1~2 Coin Power Down

21235040.name: Emperor's Guard
21235040.desc: On Lose Clash Use a Guard skill
21235040.flavor: The Emperor's guard will not falter

21235050.name: Emperor's Legion
21235050.desc:
On Win Clash Inflict 3 Green Roaches (Enraged)
On Hit Inflict 1 Green Roaches (Enraged)
On Critical Hit Inflict 2 Green Roaches (Enraged)
21235050.flavor: Rip, seep, trickle, carve, tear, devour.

21235060.name: Roach's Feast
21235060.desc: Round Start: Gain Green Roaches (Enhancing) equal to current Green Roaches (Enraged) count; lose 50% Green Roaches (Enraged)

21235070.name: Binding Vow
21235070.desc: Heal 1% max HP per Binding Vow on self (max 6%)
21235070.flavor: Why did I add this passive?
